settings.heading: Give bored dogs a better job.
settings.subheading: Turn restless energy into focused chew time with premium Himalayan yak cheese dog chews.
settings.problem_heading: Bored dogs invent their own entertainment.
settings.problem_text: Without a satisfying outlet, chewing energy can turn into destroyed shoes, couch corners, and restless pacing.
settings.solution_heading: Chewing is enrichment when the routine is right.
settings.solution_text: Prime Pet Food yak chews give dogs a dense, satisfying task that supports calmer indoor downtime.
settings.review_1: Perfect for keeping my dog busy after walks.
settings.review_2: My dog settles faster when he has a chew routine.
settings.review_3: A clean way to keep boredom under control.
settings.product_text: Use a long-lasting chew to help redirect bored chewing into supervised enrichment.
settings.final_text: Give your dog something better to do.
